name: Neuroscience
description: Synaptic biology, neural circuits, brain imaging, and neurodegeneration. Labs span basic science to translational work.
background: Biology, neuroscience, or biochemistry. Some computational labs also welcome CS/stats students.
what_students_do: Mouse surgeries, cell culture, imaging analysis, behavioral experiments, or computational modeling.

name: Oncology & Cancer Biology
description: Tumor biology, cancer immunotherapy, and cancer genomics. Strong presence in Yale's Smilow Cancer Hospital and YCCC.
background: Biology, biochemistry, or chemistry. Premed students often start here.
what_students_do: Cell culture, IHC staining, assay development, data analysis, or literature reviews.

name: Chemical Biology
description: Small molecule design, drug discovery, and chemical tools for biological questions.
background: Chemistry or biochemistry. Organic chemistry coursework is helpful.
what_students_do: Synthesis on the bench, running NMR or MS, purification, or structure-activity relationship studies.

name: Machine Learning & Quant Bio
description: Computational methods, deep learning, and data science applied to biological questions.
background: CS, statistics, math, or anyone comfortable with Python.
what_students_do: Write and run analysis pipelines, train models, process sequencing or imaging data.

name: Public Health & Epidemiology
description: Infectious disease, global health, and population-level health science.
background: Any major. Public health, sociology, or global affairs students common here.
what_students_do: Data cleaning, literature synthesis, survey work, or statistical analysis.

name: Aging & Longevity
description: Proteostasis, cellular senescence, neurodegeneration, and lifespan biology.
what_students_do: Run assays, process proteomics data, maintain model organisms, or analyze aging phenotypes.

name: Ecology & Climate
description: Conservation biology, ecology, and atmospheric and environmental chemistry.
background: Environmental science, ecology, chemistry, or earth science.
what_students_do: Field work, sample processing, data analysis, or literature reviews.

name: Structural Biology & Biophysics
description: Protein structure determination, molecular mechanics, and biophysical measurements.
what_students_do: Sample preparation, structure determination, or molecular dynamics analysis.
